accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.subtitle: Manage your account and notification preferences
accountSettings.noProfile: No ERP profile is linked to your account.
accountSettings.name: Name
accountSettings.noNotifications: You have no notification settings yet. Your administrator manages which notifications you receive.

homePage.selectModule: Select a module to get started

finance.label: Financial Management
finance.description: General ledger, journal entries, AP/AR, trial balance, and multi-level approval workflows.

warehouse.label: Warehouse & Inventory
warehouse.description: Lot-tracked inventory, goods receipts, stock transfers, and real-time balance ledger.

sales.label: Sales & Distribution
sales.description: Sales orders, shipment planning, customer invoicing, and AR integration.

production.label: Production & Manufacturing
production.description: Per-SKU pipeline dashboard, work-order creation with cart stickers, batch trace, and product/template master data.

workflow.label: Workflow Studio
workflow.description: Build custom automations by dragging nodes — connect data sources, apply logic, and trigger actions across all modules.

docs.label: Documentation
docs.description: Project architecture, module specs, database schema, RPC functions, migrations index, and design tokens.

qc.label: Quality Control
qc.description: Post-dry inspection workflow: production lots, drying sub-lots, pending queue, hold disposition, and batch trace.

packaging.label: Packaging
packaging.description: Dispatch released QC carts to packaging. FIFO-ordered cart selection, scan support, and days-in-stock tracking.

hr.label: Human Resources
hr.description: Employee directory, job titles, departments, reporting lines, and profile management.

auth.label: Users & Authentication
auth.description: User accounts, role-based access control, approval tier assignments, and audit logs.

faq.label: FAQ & Help
faq.description: How-to answers for every module of the QC & production system, with search.

loginPage.subtitle: Sign in to your account
loginPage.contactAdmin: Contact your administrator to get access.
